findings.evidence: `nl -ba code/TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/CubeGenerator.lean` shows the affected Plumbing declarations at lines 416, 423, 430, 437, 443, 449, 455, and 461; they are outside `TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/` and have no dependency on the symplectic energy/J-holomorphic changes.
findings.fix: Split the `CubeGenerator.lean` simp-normal-form cleanup into its own PR, leaving this PR focused on the Geometry/Symplectic topic.
findings.issue: The PR bundles Plumbing cube-face simp-attribute removals with the Geometry/Symplectic cleanup: `lowerFace_lowerFace_directions`, `upperFace_upperFace_directions`, `lowerFace_upperFace_directions`, `upperFace_lowerFace_directions`, and the four corresponding `_base` lemmas at lines 416, 423, 430, 437, 443, 449, 455, and 461 are independent LowDimTopology maintenance.

summary: The Geometry simp-normal-form cleanup is in-scope maintenance, but the PR also changes an independent LowDimTopology/Plumbing simp API. That makes this more than one topic under this rubric.
